⚙️ Settings

الإعدادات

Security

Company Mobile Number

Saved. This number will show in PDF/print headers.
This updates the company phone number used in PDF and print headers across modules. If empty, default 0537859509 is used.

Discount Request Approval

ON: cashier discount needs admin approval. OFF: discount works normally without request. Sales Return is not affected.

Cloud Sync

☁ Connecting…

Software Update

Check GitHub Releases and install a newer version without uninstalling this app. Local data and settings remain in the same app storage.

Backup & Restore

No automatic backup yet on this device.
Includes invoices, receipts, ledger, products, sales, stock, expenses & more · Auto cloud-sync across devices too

⚠️ Production Reset

Use this once, after testing is finished, right before going live. It clears test transactions only.
Stays safe (not touched): Inventory/Products, Customer Ledger, Staff names, Approver names, Company settings
Will be cleared (cannot be undone): Tax Invoices (number resets to 1), Cash Receipts (number resets to 1), Company Expenses, Vendor Ledger (vendors & their transactions)
